case_title: ADDHAIR TECHNOLOGIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS VALENCIA DUBOCE CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADDHAIR TECHNOLOGIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALENCIA DUBOCE CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION DEFT. WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA DUBOCE CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO VALENCIA DUBOCE CONDOMINIUM NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ADDHAIR TECHNOLOGIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA DUBOCE CONDOMINUM ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
